caption: A man with glasses and long dark hair tied back performs music in an indoor setting with brown slatted walls. He wears a white long-sleeved shirt under a black vest featuring intricate white embroidery and a red and white decorative element at the center. He stands before a black microphone on a stand, playing an acoustic guitar. The backs of several people's heads are visible in the foreground, suggesting an audience. The text "ORCA" is displayed on the right side of the scene. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a stationary position, subtly shifting his posture and moving his fingers on the guitar strings while singing into the microphone. The camera remains still, capturing the performance from a medium shot as the man's facial expressions and hand movements evolve slightly over time.
